value: Value Pack with Diamond x3,100 *Valid for 20 days

- Upon logging in each day, you can obtain diamonds for 15 days within the validity period (up to 3,100 diamonds).
- The effects of the Daily Diamond Pass expire on the day all the diamonds have been obtained.
- A pass expires 20 days after purchase. Once it expires, it becomes available for purchase again.
- The pass can be purchased again on the following day once all diamonds have been obtained and its effects expire.

- Players with the Daily Diamond Pass active can obtain diamonds upon logging in the game once per day.
- Obtained diamonds are sent to your Gifts.
- The diamonds obtainable on the day of purchase will be sent to your Gifts upon purchasing the pass.
- Even if you link your data to another device, your Daily Diamond Pass status will be carried over.
- Please note that no refunds may be issued for the Daily Diamond Pass.
